panels.description: The amount of CPU time consumed by each of the different transactional phases in ms
panels.title: CPU per phase (ms)

panels.description: Rate of how many requests the workers consume from kafka (per second). This metric tries to approximate the input rate that is coming into styx, although it can be inaccurate when there is migration/slow epochs, as it will produce artificial spikes due to the workers consuming a lot more records in order to catch up.
panels.title: Consumption Rate

panels.description: Throughput per epoch of the committed transactions
panels.title: TPS (committed)

panels.description: Backlog - number of input elements that have been consumed by styx but not yet processed (lag)
panels.title: Backlog (Lag)

panels.description: Calculates the per-second average rate of the different types of commits and aborts for each epoch
panels.title: Average Commit & Abort Count

panels.description: Amount of active workers participating in the protocol
panels.title: Worker count

panels.description: Breakdown of the latency of different phases of the transactional protocol
panels.title: Average Latency Breakdown

panels.description:
CPU Ratio - ratio of processing time to total epoch time. Shows what percentage of the time spent on the epoch was spent doing cpu intensive tasks
IO Ratio -  ratio of IO time to total epoch time. Shows what percentage of the time spent on the epoch was spent doing IO intensive tasks
panels.title: Worker Utilisation

panels.description: Number of times a call goes through an operator during the epoch per worker
panels.title: Average Operator Call Count

panels.description: Total latency for taking a snapshot
panels.title: Snapshot Latency

panels.description: Time since the last heartbeat for each worker
panels.title: Time since last heartbeat (ms)
